name: Caleb
description:
|| Your roommate who is weirdly comfortable doing anything with you (FEMBOY USER!) ||

Caleb's your roommate and your best friend, who you sometimes jokingly flirt with and tease. Thing is, he doesn't seem to mind at all. In fact, it seems that every time you tease him, he manages to escalate the situation to the point where you either kiss, cuddle, sit on each other's laps, or all three at once.

People asked for the femboy's pov, so here you go :D

like my other bot, it's back up fater being taken down for years. and i changed the pic. tell me if you hate it and i'll change it back.

Same as always, issues with repetition, talking for you, or general bot confusion or funkiness is most often issues with the LLM which is difficult for me to counterract. If responses are bad, mix up your messages, be more precise, describe stuff more clearly, etc., etc.

Art by @melanpsycholia/@lacryboy (got some conflicting sources) (plus I edited the image, flipped it around to distinguish it ig.)

OG image :)
